name: Discovery & Qualification Deck
description: First or second meeting. Champion or working team. Goal is to surface pain, qualify fit, and earn the right to a solution conversation.
audience: Champion, mid-level operators, occasionally a senior sponsor
tone: Question-led, curious, low-pressure. The deck is a conversation prompt, not a pitch.

slides.content_guidance: Customer name + meeting purpose ('Discovery Conversation') + date
What we'll cover, with timestamps if helpful (3–5 items)
One-paragraph who-we-are, NO product features. Use logo + 3 stats format
3–5 open questions framed for discussion (phrased as 'What does success look like...' not yes/no)
Macro trends in customer's industry + 3 stat callouts

slides.purpose: Where Companies Like Yours Get Stuck
slides.content_guidance: 4–6 pain themes (2×3 grid), each with 1-line description using industry language
Outcome states for the same pain themes from slide 6
3-step or 5-step engagement model — high level, vendor-neutral, product-neutral
Concrete actions with owners and dates. If unknown, mark as [NEED FROM USER]
